# virtuacloud_cloud_server (Resource)

Manages a Virtua.Cloud cloud server. Server creation may take 1-2 minutes.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ipv6_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to enable IPv6. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `offer_uuid` (String) UUID of the offer to use. Changing this triggers a resize operation.
- `project_uuid` (String) UUID of the project to assign the server to. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `system_uuid` (String) UUID of the operating system to install. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `hostname` (String) Custom hostname for the server.
- `ipv6_block_size` (Number) IPv6 block size: 128 for one IPv6, 64 for a block. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `power_state` (String) Desired power state of the server: running or stopped. Default is running.
- `resize_disk` (Boolean) Whether to resize the disk when changing the offer. Default is false.
- `restart_triggered_at` (String) Trigger a server restart by updating this to the current timestamp. The server will restart when this value changes.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_zone` (Attributes) Cloud zone details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_zone))
- `end_time` (String) Server end time.
- `is_error` (Boolean) Whether the server is in an error state.
- `is_ipv6_enabled_read` (Boolean) Whether IPv6 is enabled on the server (read-only, reflects actual server state).
- `is_processing` (Boolean) Whether the server is currently processing an operation.
- `is_setup` (Boolean) Whether the server setup is complete.
- `is_setup_at` (String) Timestamp when setup completed.
- `is_smtp_allowed` (Boolean) Whether SMTP is allowed.
- `is_suspended` (Boolean) Whether the server is suspended.
- `keyboard` (String) Keyboard layout.
- `label` (String) Server label.
- `memory_size` (String) Memory size in MB.
- `memory_size_used` (String) Memory currently in use in MB.
- `monthly_usage` (String) Current monthly usage cost.
- `name` (String) Auto-generated server name.
- `netboot_is_setup` (String) Whether netboot is set up.
- `netboot_on` (String) Netboot on status.
- `offer` (Attributes) Offer details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--offer))
- `root_disk_type` (String) Root disk type (ssd or nvme).
- `root_space` (String) Root disk space in GB.
- `setup_step` (String) Current setup step of the server.
- `short_description` (String) Short description of the server.
- `ssh_keys` (String) SSH keys assigned to the server.
- `start_time` (String) Server start time.
- `status` (String) Current server status.
- `suspension_reason` (String) Reason for suspension, if suspended.
- `system` (Attributes) Operating system details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--system))
- `uptime` (String) Server uptime in seconds.
- `uuid` (String) Server UUID. This is the unique identifier for the server.
- `vcpus` (String) Number of vCPUs.
- `vcpus_used` (String) Number of vCPUs currently in use.
- `vm_type` (String) Virtualization type (e.g. qemu).

- `country_code` (String)
- `country_name` (String)
- `datacenter_name` (String)
- `timezone` (String)
